title: Delhi court dismisses criminal defamation case by Somnath Bharti's wife against FM Nirmala Sitharaman
description: A Delhi court on Wednesday dismissed a criminal defamation case filed by Lipika Mitra, the wife of Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leader Somnath Bharti, against the Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman. Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate (ACJM) Paras Dalal of Rouse Avenue Courts said that there was no reason to proceed with the case. "The complaint stands dismissed," the judge added. A detailed order is awaited. Mitra had accused Sitharaman of "making and publishing defamatory, derogatory and libe
